summary: P1 Mobile Compatibility Testing - iOS Safari PWA focus. All critical mobile UX features verified: body scroll lock on modals, 44px touch targets, 16px input font-size to prevent iOS zoom, dvh units, safe-area padding.

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: isOpen is not defined in useEffect dependency
bugs_fixed.root_cause: The useEffect for body scroll lock was checking 'isOpen' variable which doesn't exist in TicketDetailPanel component
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed condition to always lock when component renders (since component only renders when ticket exists), removed 'isOpen' from dependency array

critical_code_review_comments: TodayPanel has proper body scroll lock implementation (lines 860-876)
ServiceRequestBuilder has proper body scroll lock implementation (lines 172-190)
ServicesPanel has touch-manipulation class and >= 44px touch targets
All input fields in ServiceRequestBuilder use text-base (16px) to prevent iOS Safari auto-zoom

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All P1 mobile compatibility tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 mobile tidy-up complete. All iOS Safari PWA compatibility features verified working: 1) Body scroll lock on TodayPanel, ServiceRequestBuilder, TicketDetailPanel using position:fixed technique. 2) All interactive buttons meet 44px minimum touch target. 3) All form inputs use 16px font-size (text-base) to prevent iOS auto-zoom. 4) Modals use 100dvh for iOS Safari viewport. 5) Safe-area-inset-bottom padding applied to modals.

body_scroll_lock.TodayPanel: PASS - Uses position:fixed technique, releases on close
body_scroll_lock.ServiceRequestBuilder: PASS - Uses position:fixed technique, releases on close
body_scroll_lock.TicketDetailPanel: PASS - Uses position:fixed technique (fixed isOpen bug), releases on close

mobile_viewport.iPhone_SE_375x667: PASS - Content fits, no horizontal scroll
